title: Plan meals
description: A recipe slotted into a specific day and meal of a weekly plan.

planId.description: the week this slot is in

recipeId.description: the recipe cooked in this slot

day.description: the calendar day of this meal

servings.description: servings to cook (scales the recipe's ingredient quantities)

rating.description: optional 1–5 rating the user gave this meal after cooking; the planner favors winners and avoids flops

cookedAt.description: when the meal was actually cooked, if marked; drives ratings and variety-over-time

nutrition.description: the computed nutrition totals for this slot
